---
title: "Vaccines"
pagetitle: "WISSPAR — Vaccine catalog"
---

Search by name, manufacturer, or serotype, and click a card to expand the trials associated with that vaccine that are in the WISSPAR database.

Two entries — **PCV14 (PneuBevax)** and **PCV25 (Inventprise)** — are marked *provisional* because their serotype composition could only be confirmed against secondary sources rather than a regulatory label at the time this page was built.

```{=html}
<div class="trials-controls">
  <input id="vx-search" type="search" placeholder="Search vaccine, manufacturer, or serotype…" aria-label="Search vaccines by name, manufacturer, or serotype" style="flex:1;min-width:280px;" />
  <select id="vx-manufacturer" aria-label="Filter by manufacturer"><option value="">All manufacturers</option></select>
  <select id="vx-status" aria-label="Filter by status"><option value="">All statuses</option></select>
</div>
<div class="trials-count" id="vx-count"></div>
<div id="vx-list"></div>

<script type="module">
const DATA_URL = "data/wisspar_export.json";

/* ---------- curated vaccine catalog ---------- */
/* Serotype lists and manufacturers verified against FDA/EMA/WHO product labels,
   WHO prequalification listings, and manufacturer clinical-trial protocol
   documents. `datasetLabels` are the exact `vaccine` string(s) used for this
   product in wisspar_export.json, used to join trial/phase data live. */
const CATALOG = [
  {
    name: "PCV7", brand: "Prevnar / Prevenar 7",
    manufacturer: "Wyeth (now Pfizer) — legacy, discontinued",
    status: "Discontinued",
    serotypes: ["4", "6B", "9V", "14", "18C", "19F", "23F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV7"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV10 (Synflorix)", brand: "Synflorix",
    manufacturer: "GlaxoSmithKline (GSK)",
    status: "Licensed",
    serotypes: ["1", "4", "5", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "18C", "19F", "23F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV10 (Synflorix)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV10 (Pneumosil)", brand: "Pneumosil",
    manufacturer: "Serum Institute of India (with PATH)",
    status: "Licensed / WHO prequalified",
    serotypes: ["1", "5", "6A", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "19A", "19F", "23F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV10 (Pneumosil)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV13 (Pfizer)", brand: "Prevnar 13 / Prevenar 13",
    manufacturer: "Pfizer (Wyeth)",
    status: "Licensed",
    serotypes: ["1", "3", "4", "5", "6A", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "18C", "19A", "19F", "23F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV13 (Pfizer)", "PCV13"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV13 (Walvax)", brand: "13-valent PCV",
    manufacturer: "Walvax Biotechnology (China)",
    status: "Licensed (China)",
    serotypes: ["1", "3", "4", "5", "6A", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "18C", "19A", "19F", "23F"],
    serotypeNote: "Same 13 serotypes as Prevnar 13; differs in carrier protein (tetanus toxoid rather than CRM197).",
    datasetLabels: ["PCV13 (Walvax)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV14 (PneuBevax)", brand: "PneuBevax 14",
    manufacturer: "Biological E Limited",
    status: "Licensed / WHO prequalified", provisional: true,
    serotypes: ["1", "3", "4", "5", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "18C", "19A", "19F", "22F", "23F", "33F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV14 (PneuBevax)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV15 (Vaxneuvance)", brand: "Vaxneuvance",
    manufacturer: "Merck",
    status: "Licensed",
    serotypes: ["1", "3", "4", "5", "6A", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "18C", "19A", "19F", "22F", "23F", "33F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV15", "PCV15 (high dose)", "PCV15 (medium dose)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV20 (Prevnar 20)", brand: "Prevnar 20 / Apexxnar",
    manufacturer: "Pfizer",
    status: "Licensed",
    serotypes: ["1", "3", "4", "5", "6A", "6B", "7F", "8", "9V", "10A", "11A", "12F", "14", "15B", "18C", "19A", "19F", "22F", "23F", "33F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV20"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV21 / V116 (Capvaxive)", brand: "Capvaxive",
    manufacturer: "Merck",
    status: "Licensed (adults)",
    serotypes: ["3", "6A", "7F", "8", "9N", "10A", "11A", "12F", "15A", "15B", "16F", "17F", "19A", "20A", "22F", "23A", "23B", "24F", "31", "33F", "35B"],
    serotypeNote: "Adult-focused formulation; the FDA label also extends the protective claim to serotype 15C via cross-reactivity with 15B.",
    datasetLabels: ["PCV21(Merck V116)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV24 (Vaxcyte VAX-24)", brand: "VAX-24",
    manufacturer: "Vaxcyte, Inc.",
    status: "Investigational",
    serotypes: ["1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6A", "6B", "7F", "8", "9N", "9V", "10A", "11A", "12F", "14", "15B", "17F", "18C", "19A", "19F", "20B", "22F", "23F", "33F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV24 (Vaxcyte VAX-24)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV25 (Inventprise)", brand: "IVT PCV25",
    manufacturer: "Inventprise, Inc.",
    status: "Investigational", provisional: true,
    serotypes: ["1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6B", "6C", "7F", "8", "9N", "9V", "10A", "12F", "14", "15A", "15B", "16F", "18C", "19A", "19F", "22F", "23F", "24F", "33F", "35B"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV25 (Inventprise)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV31 (Vaxcyte VAX-31)", brand: "VAX-31",
    manufacturer: "Vaxcyte, Inc.",
    status: "Investigational",
    serotypes: ["1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6A", "6B", "7C", "7F", "8", "9N", "9V", "10A", "11A", "12F", "14", "15A", "15B", "16F", "17F", "18C", "19A", "19F", "20B", "22F", "23A", "23B", "23F", "31", "33F", "35B"],
    datasetLabels: ["PCV31 (Vaxcyte VAX-31)"],
  },
  {
    name: "PPV23 (Pneumovax 23)", brand: "Pneumovax 23",
    manufacturer: "Merck",
    status: "Licensed",
    serotypes: ["1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6B", "7F", "8", "9N", "9V", "10A", "11A", "12F", "14", "15B", "17F", "18C", "19F", "19A", "20", "22F", "23F", "33F"],
    datasetLabels: ["PPV23"],
  },
  {
    name: "PCV10 (GSK investigational)", brand: "PHiD-CV + dPly/PhtD (candidate code 2189242A)",
    manufacturer: "GlaxoSmithKline (GSK)",
    status: "Investigational — never licensed",
    serotypes: ["1", "4", "5", "6B", "7F", "9V", "14", "18C", "19F", "23F"],
    serotypeNote: "Same 10-serotype PHiD-CV (Synflorix) backbone, evaluated in high-dose (HD) and low-dose (LD) arms with two added non-serotype protein antigens (dPly, PhtD) rather than additional serotypes.",
    datasetLabels: ["PCV10 (GSK 2189242A HD)", "PCV10 (GSK 2189242A LD)"],
  },
];

/* ---------- helpers ---------- */
const esc = (s) => String(s ?? "").replace(/[&<>"]/g, (c) =>
  ({ "&": "&amp;", "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", '"': "&quot;" }[c]));
const naturalSort = (a, b) =>
  String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: "base" });
function trialLink(id) {
  return /^NCT/.test(id)
    ? `<a href="https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/${id}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${id}<span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a>`
    : id;
}

/* Join trial data onto the catalog: a trial "evaluates" a vaccine if any row
   for that trial has a `vaccine` field equal to (or, for combination-arm rows
   like "PCV13+PCV20", containing as a "+"-separated part) one of its
   datasetLabels. */
function attachTrials(rows) {
  const labelToEntry = new Map();
  for (const entry of CATALOG) {
    for (const label of entry.datasetLabels) labelToEntry.set(label, entry);
    entry.trials = new Map(); // study_id -> Set<phase>
  }
  for (const r of rows) {
    if (!r.study_id || !r.vaccine) continue;
    const parts = r.vaccine.split("+").map((p) => p.trim());
    const matched = new Set();
    for (const part of parts) {
      const entry = labelToEntry.get(part);
      if (entry) matched.add(entry);
    }
    for (const entry of matched) {
      if (!entry.trials.has(r.study_id)) entry.trials.set(r.study_id, new Set());
      if (r.phase) entry.trials.get(r.study_id).add(r.phase);
    }
  }
}

function card(v) {
  const trialRows = [...v.trials.entries()]
    .map(([nct, phases]) => ({ nct, phase: [...phases].sort(naturalSort).join(", ") }))
    .sort((a, b) => naturalSort(a.nct, b.nct));

  const statusCls = v.status.startsWith("Licensed") ? "lk-tag--status"
    : v.status === "Discontinued" ? "" : "lk-tag--key";

  const trialsHtml = trialRows.length
    ? `<div class="vx-tablewrap"><table class="lk-table">
        <thead><tr><th scope="col">Trial</th><th scope="col">Phase</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${trialRows.map((t) => `<tr><td>${trialLink(esc(t.nct))}</td><td>${esc(t.phase) || "—"}</td></tr>`).join("")}</tbody>
      </table></div>`
    : `<p class="lk-muted">No trials in this database evaluate this product yet.</p>`;

  return `<details class="vx-card" ${trialRows.length ? "" : ""}>
    <summary>
      <div class="vx-card-top">
        <span class="vx-name">${esc(v.name)}</span>
        <span class="lk-tags">
          <span class="lk-tag ${statusCls}">${esc(v.status)}</span>
          <span class="lk-tag">${v.serotypes.length}-valent</span>
          <span class="lk-tag">${trialRows.length} trial${trialRows.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</span>
          ${v.provisional ? `<span class="lk-tag lk-tag--results">Provisional</span>` : ""}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="vx-card-sub">${esc(v.brand)} — ${esc(v.manufacturer)}</div>
    </summary>
    <div class="vx-card-body">
      <div class="vx-subhead">Serotypes (${v.serotypes.length})</div>
      <div class="lk-tags lk-tags--wrap">${v.serotypes.map((s) => `<span class="lk-tag">${esc(s)}</span>`).join("")}</div>
      ${v.serotypeNote ? `<p class="lk-muted">${esc(v.serotypeNote)}</p>` : ""}
      <div class="vx-subhead">Clinical trials evaluating this vaccine</div>
      ${trialsHtml}
    </div>
  </details>`;
}

(async function () {
  const list = document.getElementById("vx-list");
  const countEl = document.getElementById("vx-count");
  const search = document.getElementById("vx-search");
  const manufacturerSel = document.getElementById("vx-manufacturer");
  const statusSel = document.getElementById("vx-status");

  try {
    const rows = await (await fetch(DATA_URL)).json();
    attachTrials(rows);
  } catch (e) {
    countEl.textContent = "Could not load trial data; showing catalog without trial counts.";
  }

  [...new Set(CATALOG.map((v) => v.manufacturer))].sort(naturalSort)
    .forEach((m) => manufacturerSel.add(new Option(m, m)));
  [...new Set(CATALOG.map((v) => v.status))].sort(naturalSort)
    .forEach((s) => statusSel.add(new Option(s, s)));

  function hay(v) {
    return [v.name, v.brand, v.manufacturer, ...v.serotypes].join(" ").toLowerCase();
  }

  function render() {
    const q = search.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const manufacturer = manufacturerSel.value, status = statusSel.value;
    const view = CATALOG.filter((v) => {
      if (manufacturer && v.manufacturer !== manufacturer) return false;
      if (status && v.status !== status) return false;
      if (q && !hay(v).includes(q)) return false;
      return true;
    });
    list.innerHTML = view.map(card).join("") || `<p class="lk-empty">No vaccines match your search.</p>`;
    countEl.textContent = `${view.length} of ${CATALOG.length} vaccines`;
  }

  [search, manufacturerSel, statusSel].forEach((el) => el.addEventListener("input", render));
  render();
})();
</script>
```
